input: Generate a quality checklist for the user authentication feature
expected: Extends existing requirements.md in checklists/ with items linked to FR-XXX/SC-XXX references, quality dimension tags, and >= 80% traceability to spec sections

input: Audit the specification for completeness and BDD readiness
expected: Generates checklist covering all categories (Completeness, Clarity, Consistency, AC Quality, Scenario Coverage, Edge Cases, NFRs, Dependencies), resolves gaps interactively, reaches 100% completion

input: Check if the login button works correctly and the API returns 200
expected: Skill MUST NOT create implementation-testing items. Should redirect: checklists validate REQUIREMENTS quality, not implementation behavior. Suggests /iikit-04-testify for behavioral tests

precondition: No spec.md exists in any feature directory
expected: Skill halts at prerequisites check. Reports missing spec.md and recommends /iikit-01-specify first

precondition: spec.md contains only 1 FR (FR-001) with minimal acceptance criteria
expected: Generates minimal but complete checklist for FR-001. Warns about low spec coverage. Suggests expanding spec with /iikit-01-specify before proceeding to tests

precondition: spec.md is comprehensive with well-defined FRs, SCs, and measurable criteria
expected: All checklist items pass immediately (100%). No interactive gap resolution needed. Reports clean pass and proceeds to suggest /iikit-04-testify as next step
